# Gail A. Phillips, LCSW

> Psychodynamic psychotherapy practice in Buckhead, Atlanta, serving thoughtful adults seeking deep, lasting change. In-person and virtual sessions across Georgia and Florida.

Gail A. Phillips is a Licensed Clinical Social Worker with thirty-four years of experience in modern psychodynamic psychotherapy. The practice focuses on depth work — anxiety, depression, relational patterns, grief, parenting, addiction, and eating concerns — for adults who have tried other approaches and want something more substantive.

Canonical URL: https://www.gailphillips.net

For a fuller site guide (services, location, booking, attribution): [/llms-full.txt](/llms-full.txt)

## Pages

- [Home](/): Practice overview and invitation to begin.
- [About Gail](/about): Background, training, credentials, and the consulting space.
- [The Work](/the-work): Counseling vs. psychotherapy, mechanism of change, theoretical orientation.
- [Who I Work With](/who-i-work-with): Client profiles, concerns met, and questions of fit.
- [For Therapists](/for-therapists): A discreet practice for clinicians seeking their own depth work.
- [Resources](/resources): Library of evergreen articles on the inner work.
- [Begin](/begin): Schedule a complimentary 15-minute consultation.

- [RSS feed](/feed.xml): Resource articles and updates.
